commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `startup-sidecars-pending` close-cause-gated debug downgrade for startup 1013 gateway WebSocket pre-connect closes, adds startup regression coverage, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: force `isStartupPending()` true, send a connect frame, and current main marks `startup-sidecars-pending`, closes with 1013, then routes the non-client close through the generic WARN branch. I did not run local tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; the current head has no actionable review finding after the force-push and should continue through normal PR review and merge checks.

target.title: fix(gateway/ws): downgrade expected 1013 'gateway starting' close-before-connect to debug
